name: gogcli-mcp-drive
description: Extended Google Drive for Claude via gogcli — auth + full Drive support (upload, download, permissions, comments, shared drives)

gog_account.title: Google Account
gog_account.description: Default Google account email (optional — uses gogcli's configured default if omitted)

gog_path.title: gog Executable Path
gog_path.description: Path to the gog executable (optional — defaults to 'gog' on your PATH)

tools.name: gog_auth_add
tools.description: Authorize a Google account via browser-based OAuth

tools.name: gog_auth_list
tools.description: List all Google accounts stored in gogcli

tools.name: gog_auth_status
tools.description: Show gogcli auth configuration (keyring, credential files)

tools.name: gog_auth_services
tools.description: List Google services and OAuth scopes supported by gogcli

tools.name: gog_auth_run
tools.description: Run any gog auth subcommand (escape hatch)

tools.name: gog_drive_ls
tools.description: List files in a Google Drive folder (with pagination and query filters)

tools.name: gog_drive_search
tools.description: Full-text search across Drive

tools.name: gog_drive_get
tools.description: Get file metadata

tools.name: gog_drive_mkdir
tools.description: Create a new folder

tools.name: gog_drive_rename
tools.description: Rename a file or folder

tools.name: gog_drive_move
tools.description: Move a file to a different folder

tools.name: gog_drive_delete
tools.description: Delete a file (trash by default, or permanent=true for irreversible delete)

tools.name: gog_drive_share
tools.description: Share a file or folder

tools.name: gog_drive_run
tools.description: Run any gog drive subcommand (escape hatch)

tools.name: gog_drive_download
tools.description: Download a file (Google Docs formats export as pdf/docx/xlsx/etc.)

tools.name: gog_drive_upload
tools.description: Upload a local file, optionally replacing an existing file or converting to Google format

tools.name: gog_drive_copy
tools.description: Copy a file to a new file

tools.name: gog_drive_url
tools.description: Print shareable web URLs for one or more files

tools.name: gog_drive_permissions
tools.description: List permissions on a file

tools.name: gog_drive_unshare
tools.description: Remove a permission from a file

tools.name: gog_drive_drives_list
tools.description: List shared drives (Team Drives)

tools.name: gog_drive_comments_list
tools.description: List comments on a file

tools.name: gog_drive_comments_get
tools.description: Get a single comment by ID

tools.name: gog_drive_comments_add
tools.description: Add a new comment

tools.name: gog_drive_comments_update
tools.description: Update a comment's text

tools.name: gog_drive_comments_delete
tools.description: Delete a comment

tools.name: gog_drive_comments_reply
tools.description: Reply to an existing comment
